title: Global Markets Brief — 25 Jun 2026
intro: Markets show cautious risk sentiment as Japan surges on weak yen support while tech weakness and falling crude signal growth concerns amid mixed economic signals.

sections.heading: 🌍 MACRO TONE
sections.content: Markets show cautious risk sentiment as Japan surges on weak yen support while tech weakness and falling crude signal growth concerns amid mixed economic signals.

sections.heading: 📊 FX RANKING
sections.content:
GBP +0.10% — Sterling holds gains on sticky UK inflation expectations
EUR +0.04% — Euro supported by hawkish ECB repricing
USD +0.04% — Dollar mixed as Treasury yields consolidate
CHF +0.01% — Franc stable in low-volatility environment
JPY -0.03% — Yen weakens further past 161.79, intervention risks rising
CAD -0.04% — Loonie pressured by crude oil decline
AUD -0.12% — Aussie soft on China growth concerns
NZD -0.14% — Kiwi weakest on dovish RBNZ expectations

sections.heading: 💱 KEY PAIRS
sections.content:
EURUSD 1.1365 | Bias: NEUTRAL | Watch: Support at 1.1340, resistance at 1.1400 on low volatility consolidation
USDJPY 161.79 | Bias: SHORT | Watch: 162.00 critical level, MOF intervention risk escalating above this threshold
AUDUSD 0.6895 | Bias: SHORT | Watch: Break below 0.6880 targets 0.6850 on commodities weakness

sections.heading: 📈 INDICES
sections.content:
Nikkei 225 72378 +4.63% — Explosive rally driven by weaker yen boosting exporter competitiveness
S&P 500 5733 -0.05% — Modest decline as investors rotate from growth to value
Nasdaq 25477 -0.43% — Tech underperforms on profit-taking after recent rally
DAX 24740 -0.62% — German equities pressured by energy sector weakness

sections.heading: 🛢️ COMMODITIES
sections.content:
Gold $4002.40 -0.16% — Consolidating near record highs as geopolitical premiums persist despite dollar stability
WTI Crude $69.36 -1.39% — Sharp decline on demand concerns and inventory build expectations
Silver $57.29 -1.37% — Industrial metal sentiment weakens tracking crude and growth worries

sections.heading: ₿ CRYPTO
sections.content:
Bitcoin $61552 +0.93% — Modest rebound as institutional buying returns near $60k support zone
Ethereum $1644.30 +1.53% — Outperforming on network upgrade optimism and staking demand recovery

sections.heading: 🎯 TRADE IDEAS
sections.content:
LONG: USDJPY 161.50 | Fade intervention fears for final push toward 162.50 before MOF action
LONG: Bitcoin 60800-61200 | Accumulate dip with tight stops targeting $64k on momentum shift
SHORT: WTI Crude 69.80-70.20 | Fade rallies on demand weakness targeting $66.50
SHORT: AUDUSD 0.6920-0.6940 |
